No refunds for tuition or construction fees if student is expelled
Mwanafunzi anapofukuzwa shule kwa sababu yeyote hakuna malipo ya ada na michango mingine aliyolipa atakayorudishiwa mzazi au mlezi
Student will be sent home if they do not bring bank slips for tuition and construction fees on the first day
Mwanafunzi asipokuja na bank slip ya malipo ya ada na fedha za ujenzi siku ya kufungua shule atarudishwa nyumbani siku hiyo hiyo
Theft, poor academic performance, absenteeism, immoral behavior, leaving school without permission
Kukamatwa na vitu vilivyopigwa marufuku, Kushindwa masomo au utoro wa darasani, Tabia ya kutoshiriki ibada, Kutoka nje ya eneo la shule bila ruhusa, Tabia/Maisha mengine yanayokinzana na maadili
If a student is expelled for any reason no tuition or construction fees will be refunded to the parent or guardian
Mwanafunzi anapofukuzwa shule kwa sababu yeyote hakuna malipo ya ada na michango mingine aliyolipa atakayorudishiwa mzazi au mlezi
Students must be respectful to themselves and others including teachers staff priests and guests
Kila mwanafunzi anapaswa awe mtiifu na mwenye heshima kwake binafsi na kwa watu wote wakiwemo walimu, wafanyakazi, mapadre na wageni wengine
No bullying of any kind, especially by older students against younger ones
Uonevu wa aina yoyote hautavumiliwa. Hasa wa wakubwa kwa wadogo
No inappropriate relationships between students, staff, teachers, or guardians
Utani usiyofaa usiwepo kati ya wanafunzi, wafanyakazi, walimu na kwa walezi wote
Permission to sleep outside the school is granted by the Rector or his assistant or the priest in charge
Ruhusa ya kulala nje ya shule hutolewa na Gombera au msaidizi wake au padre aliyepo seminarini kwa wakati huo
School uniforms must be worn at all times unless on designated days
Sare za shule lazima zivaliwe wakati wote unaotakiwa isipokuwa kwa siku zile zilizoruhusiwa tu
Students must respect prayers, manual work, and studies without neglecting good relationships with others and maintaining discipline at all times
Kila mwanafunzi anapaswa kuheshimu sala, kazi za mikono na masomo darasani bila kusahau uhusiano mwema na wengine na kuwa na nidhamu muda wote
No abusive language, written or spoken, is allowed
Matusi ya aina yoyote  yawe ya kusema au kuandika hayaruhusiwi
Students must respect and take care of school property. Any damage must be compensated by the student
Kila mwanafunzi lazima aheshimu na kutunza mali ya shule. Uharibifu wowote utakaotokea utabidi ugharamiwe na mwanafunzi mwenyewe
Personal hygiene, clothing, and environmental cleanliness are the responsibility of every student. Fridays are for washing and changing bedding, and Thursdays are for changing school uniforms
Usafi wa mwili na mavazi na mazingira ni wajibu wa kila mwanafunzi. Kila jumamosi ni siku ya kufua na kubadilisha matandiko na Alhamisi ni siku ya kubadilisha sare za shule
Returning late after holidays without a reason and a letter from the Parish Priest is an offense
Kuchelewa kwa mseminari baada ya likizo kuisha bila sababu na barua ya Paroko ni kosa
School property must be used carefully and wisely
Mali za seminari ni lazima zitumiwe kwa uangalifu na busara
Good behavior and discipline inside and outside the seminary are mandatory for every student
Tabia njema na nidhamu ndani na nje ya seminari ni wajibu na ni lazima kwa kila mwanafunzi
Use of inappropriate words or writing is strictly prohibited anywhere in the seminary
Upokeaji au uandishi wa maneno yasiyofaa ni mwiko mahali popote hapa seminarini
Students are not allowed to visit the residences of teachers, priests, or staff without special permission
Mwanafunzi haruhusiwi kwenda makazi ya waalimu, mapadre au wafanyakazi bila ruhusa maalum
Students should meet teachers in the staff room when they need academic assistance, not in their homes
Wanafunzi wakutane na waalimu 'Staff room' pale wanapohitaji msaada wa kimasomo na si kwenye nyumba zao
Roll call or inspections can happen at any time without prior notice, especially if there is suspicion of truancy or loss of items
Roll-Call au Inspection inaweza kufanyika wakati wowote bila taarifa rasmi hasa pale panapohisiwa kutokea utoro au upotevu wa kitu
Guardians houses are for guardians only. Students may enter only when necessary or in emergencies and must do so respectfully

Nyumba za walezi ni kwa ajili ya walezi, hivyo zipewe heshima na mwanafunzi ataingia katika nyumba hizo inapobidi au anapokuwa na shughuli maalum na kwa wakati unaofaa au kwa jambo la dharura, kwa vyovyote vile itakapobidi aingie anapaswa kufanya hivyo kwa nidhamu
Students are not allowed to keep money in their dormitories or anywhere else except with the seminary accountant. If caught strict measures will be taken including confiscation without refund

Mwanafunzi haruhusiwi kuhifadhi fedha bwenini au mahali pengine popote ila kwa muhasibu wa Seminari pekee. Akikamatwa hatua kalizitachukuliwa ikiwa ni pamoja na kunyang'anywa fedha hizo bila kurudishiwa
Students must use the priest's phone for communication with parents or guardians and not their own phones
Mwanafunzi anapopatwa na tatizo Seminarini haruhusiwi kuruka ngazi zilizowekwa na utawala
It is an offense for a student to use a guardian's name inappropriately, including asking for money from parents or guardians for personal gain
Ni kosa kwa mwanafunzi kutumia majina ya walezi vibaya ikiwa ni pamoja na kuomba fedha kwa wazazi au walezi kwa malengo binafsi
Students are not allowed to wear another student's clothes, including school uniforms, work clothes, or undergarments
Ni marufuku mwanafunzi kuvaa nguo za mwanafunzi mwingine ikiwemo sare za shule, nguo za kazi na nguo nyingine zikiwemo nguo za ndani
To provide holistic formation (intellectual, physical, moral, spiritual, and vocational) to young boys, preparing them to serve the Church as priests in the future.
Lengo la Seminari ni kuwapatia vijana wadogo wa kiume malezi mfungamano ya kiakili, kimwili, kimaadili, kiutu na kiroho huku wakitarajiwa kuwa wahudumu wa Kanisa, yaani mapadre hapo baadaye.
The Pre-Form One program is a short-term introduction to seminary life before joining Form One.
Kipindi hiki cha "Preform One" na malezi ni cha muda mfupi; lengo likiwa ni kuyajua na kuyaishi Maisha ya Seminari kabla ya kujiunga na Kidato cha Kwanza.
Students who arrive without prior notice and valid reasons will lose their admission.
Kushindwa kwako kufika bila taarifa za awali na sababu za msingi sana utakuwa umepoteza nafasi yako ya kujiunga na Seminari.
Wishing you good studies and formation in Arusha Catholic Seminary.
Tunakutakia masomo na malezi mema katika Seminari yetu ya Arusha Catholic Seminary.

Mimi natambua wajibu wangu kwa Taifa na Kanisa kama Mwanafunzi na ninaahidi kwamba: (a) Nitatii na kuwaheshimu viongozi wangu wote katika ngazi zote za uongozi wa shule; (b) Nitafuata kanuni na sheria zote za shule pamoja na maelekezo yote yanayotolewa mara kwa mara na viongozi wa shule katika ngazi zote; (c) Sitatoka nje ya mipaka ya shule wakati wowote wa masomo labda tu kwa shughuli maalum na kwa ruhusa maalum ya Mkuu wa Shule au Makamu Mkuu wa Shule; (d) Kupata wastani wa shule katika mitihani kuanzia wastani wa alama 65%. (e) Kama nitashindwa kufuata vipengele vyote vilivyotajwa hapo juu hatua kali ichukuliwe dhidi yangu ambayo ni pamoja na kusimamishwa masomo mara moja.
